summary: Started with help to discover API actions, enabled reconfigure mode for route X-01, then set the route status to open; despite intermittent -925 server outages, the flag was retrieved.
lesson: Always start with the help action to learn available operations; use reconfigure then setstatus to activate a route. Add robust retry logic and exponential backoff for transient -925 errors, validate required fields before sending to avoid -990, and insert small waits between calls to reduce race/outage issues.
